metadata.description: Azure region for all resources

Environment name
Number of session host VMs
VM size for session hosts
Image source for the session host OS image.
Marketplace image publisher for session hosts when imageSource is Marketplace.
Marketplace image offer for session hosts when imageSource is Marketplace.
Marketplace image SKU for session hosts when imageSource is Marketplace.
Marketplace image version for session hosts when imageSource is Marketplace.
Azure Compute Gallery subscription ID for session hosts when imageSource is AzureComputeGallery.
Azure Compute Gallery resource group name for session hosts when imageSource is AzureComputeGallery.
Azure Compute Gallery name for session hosts when imageSource is AzureComputeGallery.
Azure Compute Gallery image definition name for session hosts when imageSource is AzureComputeGallery.
Azure Compute Gallery image version for session hosts when imageSource is AzureComputeGallery.
Session host security type. Auto uses Trusted Launch for Azure Compute Gallery images and Standard for Marketplace images.
Preferred AVD delivery mode. Leave empty to preserve the legacy desktop-only behavior driven by hostPoolType.
Host pool type
Authentication type for session host sign-in and join flow
Active Directory domain FQDN (required for HybridJoin)
Domain join service account in DOMAIN\username or username@domain format (required for HybridJoin)
Domain join service account password (required for HybridJoin)
Optional OU path where computer accounts should be created for HybridJoin (for example OU=AVD,DC=contoso,DC=com)
Local admin username for session hosts
Local admin password for session hosts
Deploy FSLogix profile storage
Storage account name for FSLogix profiles (must be globally unique, 3-24 chars, lowercase/numbers only)
Deploy monitoring (Log Analytics)
Deploy a private endpoint for the FSLogix storage account and disable public network access. Requires a private endpoint subnet (created automatically in Greenfield mode).
Choose whether to use an existing VNet or create a new spoke VNet for the deployment.
Name of the existing virtual network to use
Resource group name that contains the existing virtual network
Name of the existing subnet for session hosts
Name of the existing subnet reserved for private endpoints
Name of the new spoke virtual network to create when networkMode is CreateNewVnet.
Address prefix for the new spoke virtual network when networkMode is CreateNewVnet.
Name of the session host subnet to create when networkMode is CreateNewVnet.
Address prefix for the session host subnet when networkMode is CreateNewVnet.
Name of the private endpoint subnet to create when networkMode is CreateNewVnet.
Address prefix for the private endpoint subnet when networkMode is CreateNewVnet.
Resource ID of the existing hub virtual network to peer with when networkMode is CreateNewVnet.
Host pool name
Comma or newline separated Entra Object IDs to grant AVD access. Leave empty to skip role assignments.
Typed access assignments for the desktop application group. Each item must include principalId and principalType.
Typed access assignments for the RemoteApp application group. Each item must include principalId and principalType.

RemoteApp definitions used when avdMode publishes RemoteApps. Each item must include name and filePath and can optionally include friendlyName, description, commandLineSetting, and commandLineArguments.
Per-deployment seed used to keep session host computer names unique across redeployments in the same resource group.

variables.sessionHostImageReference: [if(equals(parameters('imageSource'), 'AzureComputeGallery'), createObject('id', resourceId(parameters('galleryImageSubscriptionId'), parameters('galleryImageResourceGroupName'), 'Microsoft.Compute/galleries/images/versions', parameters('galleryName'), parameters('galleryImageDefinitionName'), parameters('galleryImageVersion'))), createObject('publisher', parameters('marketplaceImagePublisher'), 'offer', parameters('marketplaceImageOffer'), 'sku', parameters('marketplaceImageSku'), 'version', parameters('marketplaceImageVersion')))]

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[copyIndex()]]), 'InstallAVDAgentEntra')]
dependsOn: [extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.DesktopVirtualization/hostPools', parameters('hostPoolName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.DesktopVirtualization/hostPools', parameters('hostPoolName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[copyIndex()]]])), 'avd-contributor'))]

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[copyIndex()]]), 'InstallAVDAgentHybrid')]
dependsOn: [extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.DesktopVirtualization/hostPools', parameters('hostPoolName')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.DesktopVirtualization/hostPools', parameters('hostPoolName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[range(0, parameters('sessionHostCount'))[copyIndex()]]])), 'avd-contributor'))]

properties.description: Associates the session host with the shared AVD monitoring rule.

variables.storageNetworkAcls: [if(parameters('deployPrivateEndpoint'), createObject('defaultAction', 'Deny', 'bypass', 'None', 'virtualNetworkRules', createArray()), createObject('defaultAction', 'Deny', 'bypass', 'AzureServices', 'virtualNetworkRules', if(not(empty(parameters('sessionHostSubnetId'))), createArray(createObject('id', parameters('sessionHostSubnetId'), 'action', 'Allow')), createArray())))]
